parameters.query: SELECT decision_id, agent_role, decision_type, input_summary, recommendation, risk_level, confidence, created_at FROM ai_decisions WHERE status = 'pending_approval' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50;
UPDATE ai_decisions SET status = $1, approved_by = $2 WHERE decision_id = $3::uuid RETURNING decision_id, agent_role, decision_type, recommendation;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, decision_id: $('Update Decision Status').item.json.decision_id }) }}
